# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservices-app
  labels:
    app: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservices
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservices
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app-container
        image: your-repo/microservices-app:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        env:
        - name: SECRET_KEY
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: app-secrets
              key: secret-key
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1001
          runAsGroup: 3001
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          capabilities:
            drop:
              - ALL
      imagePullSecrets:
      - name: regcred

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: microservices-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: microservices

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: microservices-ingress
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /
spec:
  rules:
  - host: your-domain.com
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: microservices-service
            port:
              number: 80

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: app-secrets
type: Opaque
data:
  secret-key: c2VjcmV0X2tleV92YWx1ZQ==  # base64 encoded value of your secret key
